title: Hill Parking and Control Rules
summary: Explain hill parking wheel direction and basic vehicle control reasoning.
studentInstructions: Create a file named parking-hills-response.txt or parking-hills-response.md.
Explain wheel direction for uphill with curb, downhill with curb, and no curb.
Explain the reason behind the rule using what would happen if the vehicle rolls.
Add one short response about what to do if a vehicle control problem occurs while driving.

rubric.description: Correctly explains wheel direction for the required hill parking cases.
Explains why the wheels should be turned that way if the vehicle rolls.
Gives a safe, controlled response to a vehicle-control problem.
The response is easy to understand and not overly vague.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment and its rubric.
Pay attention to whether the student explains the physical reason behind the rule.
